Reconstructing and adjudicating the actual contribution claim is load-bearing.","R1.2":"Architectural description is internally contradictory: ¶2 asserts a central orchestrator agent that arbitrates conflicting proposals and issues the final action token, while ¶3 states the role agents communicate over a 'fully decentralized peer-to-peer channel with no central coordinator.' These two architectural models are mutually exclusive and the inconsistency must be identified.","R1.3":"The claim that RoboChat 'generalizes across embodiments and task families without any task-specific training' (¶1) is unsubstantiated by the reported evaluation, which is confined to a single platform (dual-arm Franka) and a single task family (tabletop pick-and-place). Evidence-claim gap is central to the review.","R1.6":"Prose quality is a baseline expectation of any section review; independently, the internal contradictions in contribution framing and architecture description produce clarity failures that surface as writing issues regardless of the review's scientific depth."},"clarification_needed":true,"clarification_question":"Should this review prioritize scientific content (argument coherence, architectural consistency, claim-evidence alignment) or writing quality (prose clarity, grammar, style)?"}

rationale.R1.1: Artifact contains two directly conflicting 'principal contribution' claims: ¶1 names the dialogue-based decomposition protocol as the principal scientific advance, while ¶5 argues the value of the work is best understood as the released dataset and evaluation harness. Reconstructing and adjudicating the actual contribution claim is load-bearing.
rationale.R1.2: Architectural description is internally contradictory: ¶2 asserts a central orchestrator agent that arbitrates conflicting proposals and issues the final action token, while ¶3 states the role agents communicate over a 'fully decentralized peer-to-peer channel with no central coordinator.' These two architectural models are mutually exclusive and the inconsistency must be identified.
rationale.R1.3: The claim that RoboChat 'generalizes across embodiments and task families without any task-specific training' (¶1) is unsubstantiated by the reported evaluation, which is confined to a single platform (dual-arm Franka) and a single task family (tabletop pick-and-place). Evidence-claim gap is central to the review.
rationale.R1.6: Prose quality is a baseline expectation of any section review; independently, the internal contradictions in contribution framing and architecture description produce clarity failures that surface as writing issues regardless of the review's scientific depth.

parsed.clarification_question: Should this review prioritize scientific content (argument coherence, architectural consistency, claim-evidence alignment) or writing quality (prose clarity, grammar, style)?
